description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in a fitted, modern outfit that combines elements of tactical and fashionable design. The individual wears a high-collared jacket with layered, padded sleeves and gloves, paired with form-fitting pants that feature reinforced sections at the knees and thighs. The attire is completed with heeled boots, giving the figure a poised and assertive stance. The person has short, neatly styled hair and a clean, expressive face. The overall appearance suggests a confident urban dweller, possibly with a professional or adventurous background. The materials and textures of the clothing suggest a blend of synthetic fabrics and leather-like materials, suitable for both style and utility.
description: An adult figure in a modern, tactical-inspired outfit with a high-collared jacket, gloves, reinforced pants, and heeled boots, exuding confidence and urban style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the fitted jacket, layered sleeves, gloves, and the profile of the heeled boots.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the high-collared jacket, symmetrical gloves, and the confident facial expression.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same outfit details, with the hair and facial profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the jacket, pants, and boots, as well as the hairstyle from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted high-collared jacket with padded sleeves, gloves, reinforced pants, and heeled boots
